cards.name: 2 of Cups
cards.interpretation: unity, partnership, attraction, connection, close bonds, joining forces, mutual respect

cards.name: 9 of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: unhappiness, lack of fulfilment, disappointment, underachievement, arrogance, snobbery

cards.name: Ⅰ The Magician
cards.interpretation: willpower, desire, being resourceful, skill, ability, concentration, manifestation
